title: Fallen Land
content:
The 
Fallen Land
 is a large region of the Ancient Star System that is reigned over by the Great Emperor independant of the Sovereign Union.

The area is known as a forbidden zone to the members if the union and they will often let criminals escape into it rather than pursue them.

Countless clans exist here and they even conduct trade with the Sovereign Union, dealing often in items of dubious origin such as puppets forged by refining living Cultivators. Periodically, a council of five elders are selected from among these clans to govern the region, the identity of elder however is fluid and changes hands every time the selection event comes around.

Among the clans they trade with is the Fire Sparrow Clan of the Sovereign Union's Seven Great Clans.

Great Emperor and 
Vermillon Bird Divine Sect
[
]

The Great Emperor who rules over this region in reality is the First Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor. He cares nothing for the Fallen Land itself.

There are also three Young Emperors in the Fallen Land. These are the Second Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor, the Fourth Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor and the Sixth Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor, 
Wang Lin
.
